caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is speaking in front of a plain dark grey background. She wears a light green tunic featuring floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her top. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a logo containing a stylized sun and the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, her mouth opening and closing as she delivers her presentation. She uses hand gestures to emphasize her points, moving her right hand upward and outward from her chest. Her facial expression remains engaged and professional throughout the clip, and the camera remains in a static medium shot, keeping her centered in the frame.
